prompt: Resume implementation. The plan has phases 1-5 with phases 1-3 already checked off. Continue from where we left off.
expected_output: Detects that phases 1-3 are complete and resumes from Phase 4, loading the correct files and following the workflow.
expectations: Reads the plan and detects existing checkmarks for phases 1-3
Identifies Phase 4 as the next phase to implement
Reads all files in Phase 4 before making changes
